prompt: Implement `isPalindrome(s: string): boolean` that returns true if `s` reads the same forwards and backwards (case-sensitive, no normalization).
canonicalSolution: export function isPalindrome(s: string): boolean { const r = s.split('').reverse().join(''); return s === r; }
test: assert(isPalindrome('racecar')===true); assert(isPalindrome('hello')===false); assert(isPalindrome('')===true); assert(isPalindrome('a')===true); assert(isPalindrome('Aa')===false); assert(isPalindrome('abba')===true); assert(isPalindrome('ab')===false);
